summary: Comprehensive general functionality test of 2good2breal dating profile verification service. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all major flows including homepage, login, admin dashboard, 4-step submission wizard, pricing page, and language toggle.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality verified working. Backend APIs: health, auth (login/register), admin auth, admin analyses CRUD, DOCX/PDF downloads, user dashboard, credits, stats, filters, password reset. Frontend: Homepage loads with cookie consent banner, user login/logout, admin login via collapsible panel, 4-step submission wizard (Information->Photos->Activity->Observations) with all date dropdowns working, admin dashboard with stats and submissions list, pricing page with 3 packages, language toggle EN/FR working.

backend_apis: GET /api/auth/me - returns user info with credits
frontend_flows: Homepage loads with hero section, stats (50K+ Database, 97% Detection Accuracy, 90K+ Profiles Analyzed)
Cookie consent banner appears with Accept/Reject buttons
User login flow - redirects to dashboard
User dashboard shows stats (Total Analyses, Avg Trust Score, Red Flags Found, Active Filters)
Admin login via collapsible 'Admin Access' panel
Admin dashboard shows stats (Total: 6, Pending: 5, In Review: 0, Completed: 1)
Admin dashboard shows Profile Submissions list with status badges
Step 1: Client Information (email, age, location, profile name, real name, gender, height)
Step 2: Profile Details with Date of Birth dropdowns (Day/Month/Year), Known Age, Profile Location, Occupation, Company, Platform, Bio
Step 3: Activity with Photo Information, Social Media links, Profile Creation Date dropdowns, Last communication dropdowns
Step 4: Observations with Communication Analysis, Terms checkbox, Print button, Submit button
Pricing page shows 3 packages (Basic €49, Comprehensive €99, Premium €189)
Language toggle EN/FR working (Login/Sign Up -> Connexion/S'inscrire)
18+ age restriction notice displayed on analyze page
